ptxt.intxrefpoff: Timing Chain Cover Removal and Installation

servinfosub.title: Oil Seal
servinfosub.ptxt: Check oil seal lip for fault or other damage. Replace as necessary.

servinfosub.title: Timing Chain Cover
servinfosub.ptxt: Inspect strainer (1) of oil passage for VVT actuator.
If clog or foreign matter exists, clean strainer.

servinfosub.title: Oil Gallery Pipe
servinfosub.ptxt: Inspect oil gallery pipes No.1 (1), No.2 (2) and No.3 (3).
Replace if crack, deformation or clog exists.
